ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock during the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock during the day */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock */,
  "pre_market_open" REAL /* Pre-market opening price */,
  "post_market_close" REAL /* Post-market closing price */,
  "trading_status" TEXT /* Trading status of the stock (e.g., open, closed, halted) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., exchange, data provider) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Exact timestamp of the data entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_ticker FOREIGN KEY ("ticker") REFERENCES tickers ("ticker")
)

CREATE TABLE "tickers" (
  "ticker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticker */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the company is listed */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the company */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the ticker information was updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the ticker is actively traded */,
  "currency" TEXT /* The currency in which the stock is traded */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Initial Public Offering date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technical_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technical indicator record */,
  "price_id" INTEGER /* ID of the price record associated with the indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the technical indicator (e.g., Moving Average, RSI) */,
  "indicator_value" REAL /* Value of the technical indicator */,
  "calculation_date" TEXT /* Date when the indicator was calculated */,
  "indicator_period" INTEGER /* Period over which the indicator is calculated */,
  "indicator_source" TEXT /* Source of the indicator calculation */,
  "indicator_status" TEXT /* Status of the indicator */,
  "indicator_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the indicator was calculated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_technical_indicators_price_id FOREIGN KEY ("price_id") REFERENCES stock_prices ("price_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended, locked) */,
  "last_password_change" TEXT /* Date of the last password change */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  "last_ip_address" TEXT /* Last IP address used to log in */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "ticker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ticker being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session */,
  "access_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_ticker_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticker_id") REFERENCES tickers ("ticker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_feeds" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "ticker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated ticker */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the news article */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the full article */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score of the news article */,
  "relevance_score" REAL /* Relevance score to the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_feeds_ticker_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticker_id") REFERENCES tickers ("ticker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the economic indicator */,
  "indicator_value" REAL /* Value of the economic indicator */,
  "indicator_date" TEXT /* Date of the indicator */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the economic data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)
